hooks.command:
node -e "try{var s=require('child_process').execSync;var st=s('git status --porcelain 2>NUL',{encoding:'utf8'}).trim();var up='';try{up=s('git log --oneline origin/main..HEAD 2>NUL',{encoding:'utf8'}).trim();}catch(e2){}var m=[];if(st)m.push('Uncommitted: '+st.split('
').length+' files');if(up)m.push('Unpushed:
'+up);if(m.length)console.log(JSON.stringify({systemMessage:'⚠️  UNPUSHED WORK
'+m.join('
')+'
→ Run: git add + commit + push + bd dolt push'}));}catch(e){}"
